text: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower located in Paris, France.
Python is a high-level programming language known for its readability.
The Great Wall of China stretches for thousands of miles across northern China.
Machine learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence focused on data-driven models.
Vector databases store embeddings and support approximate nearest neighbor search.
Coffee is brewed from roasted coffee beans, typically served hot.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest of the world's five oceans.
Docker lets you package applications into portable containers.
React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces.
A sentence embedding maps a piece of text into a fixed-dimensional vector.
